entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: One of the four African countries where rural livelihoods were compared and contrasted

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: One of the four African countries where rural livelihoods were compared and contrasted

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: One of the four African countries where rural livelihoods were compared and contrasted

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: One of the four African countries where rural livelihoods were compared and contrasted

entities.name: RURAL LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the basic necessities of life for people living in rural areas

entities.name: POVERTY REDUCTION POLICIES
entities.description: Strategies and guidelines aimed at reducing poverty in rural areas

entities.name: POVERTY REDUCTION STRATEGY PLANS
entities.description: Specific frameworks (PRSPs) used to implement poverty reduction policies

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOMES
entities.description: The total income received by rural households, noted as low in the studied countries

entities.name: LAND HOLDINGS
entities.description: The amount of land owned or controlled by a rural household

entities.name: LIVESTOCK HOLDINGS
entities.description: The amount of livestock owned by a rural household

entities.name: FOOD CROP AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The practice of farming crops primarily for food consumption and local sale

entities.name: MONETISATION OF THE RURAL ECONOMY
entities.description: The extent to which the rural economy transitions from subsistence to money-based transactions

entities.name: LAND SUB-DIVISION
entities.description: The process of dividing land among heirs, which can lead to smaller, less productive plots

entities.name: CIVIL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of safety and stability in rural areas, which is reported to be declining

entities.name: AGRONOMIC ADVICE
entities.description: Technical guidance provided to farmers to improve crop production and management

entities.name: INPUTS
entities.description: Agricultural supplies such as seeds and fertilizers required for farming

entities.name: PREDATORY TAXATION
entities.description: Excessive or unfair tax collection by local authorities that burdens rural incomes

entities.name: DISTRICT COUNCILS
entities.description: Decentralized local government bodies responsible for administration and tax collection

entities.name: NON-FARM SELF-EMPLOYMENT
entities.description: Income-generating activities undertaken by individuals outside of the agricultural sector

entities.name: NON-FARM ENTERPRISES
entities.description: Small businesses and commercial activities operating in the non-agricultural sector
